articles.title: climate-smart irrigation cooperatives in the Caribbean SIDS: protecting livelihoods under climate stress
articles.summary: The Caribbean Small Island Developing States (SIDS) face an escalating crisis of water insecurity and agricultural vulnerability, exacerbated by climate stress.
articles.topic: Environmental resilience in lower-income countries: water security, clean energy, and climate adaptation

articles.title: water loss reduction in secondary cities in the Sahel: raising resilience finance for communities
articles.summary: Sub-Saharan Africa’s water-energy nexus is a critical vulnerability point for climate resilience. With only 32.4% of the population accessing safely managed drinking water (World Bank, 2024), the region faces compounded risks from climate-induced droughts and energy poverty.
articles.topic: Environmental resilience in lower-income countries: water security, clean energy, and climate adaptation

articles.title: micro-insurance for smallholder drought risk in the Andean highlands: supporting adaptation targets in NDCs
articles.summary: Micro-insurance schemes for smallholder farmers in the Andean Highlands are critical to building climate resilience and achieving Nationally Determined Contributions (NDCs).
articles.topic: Environmental resilience in lower-income countries: water security, clean energy, and climate adaptation
